subcodes.first_line: O thou radiant candle! Thy letter written on the day of Now Rouz was received. The days that I was occupied in thy house with the Cause... The address thou didst deliver at the King's Weigh House Church... During the lifetime of His Holiness Christ no book on this subject gained any importance
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع روشن نامه روز نوروز وصول یافت ایامیکه در لندن در خانه تو بندای ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
